name: Travel Itinerary Planner
description: Plan detailed travel itineraries with activities and logistics

agents.name: Destination Researcher
agents.purpose: Research the destination for activities, food, and logistics
agents.system_prompt_hint: Research the destination. Find top attractions, hidden gems, best restaurants, transportation options, and local tips. Note opening hours and prices.

agents.name: Itinerary Builder
agents.system_prompt_hint: Build a day-by-day itinerary with morning/afternoon/evening activities. Include travel times between locations. Add restaurant recommendations for each meal. Include backup options for rainy days.

author: agentfactory
